title: Squirrel Removal in Metuchen, NJ | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Metuchen, NJ. Humane trapping, exclusion, and attic cleanup. Serving homes near downtown Metuchen. Call for fast service!
intro: Squirrels in your Metuchen attic or walls? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services throughout Metuchen, New Jersey. Our experienced technicians use humane trapping methods and permanent exclusion solutions to protect your home from squirrel damage.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served the greater NYC metropolitan area including Metuchen for over a decade, combining local expertise with proven wildlife control methods. Our licensed technicians provide guaranteed squirrel removal with same-day emergency service available for Metuchen homeowners.
localContext: Metuchen's tree-lined streets and charming Victorian and Colonial-style homes near Main Street and the Historic District provide ideal habitats for gray squirrels seeking attic entry points. The mature oak and maple trees throughout residential neighborhoods near Middlesex County College create squirrel highways that lead directly to roof lines and chimneys.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Metuchen, NJ?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Metuchen typically costs between $900 and $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and necessary repairs. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work, and entry point sealing. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes for all Metuchen properties.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Metuchen home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service in Metuchen and can typically begin trapping within 24 hours of your call. Most squirrel removal projects are completed within 3-7 days, though larger infestations may take up to two weeks. We'll provide a clear timeline after our initial inspection.

faqs.question: What damage can squirrels cause to Metuchen homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels can cause significant damage to Metuchen homes by chewing through roof shingles, soffit vents, and fascia boards to access attics. Once inside, they gnaw on electrical wiring (creating fire hazards), tear insulation for nesting, and leave droppings that contaminate attic spaces. Early removal prevents costly structural and electrical repairs.

faqs.question: Do you offer warranties on squirrel exclusion work in Metuchen?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide a comprehensive warranty on all exclusion and seal-up work performed in Metuchen. If squirrels re-enter through any area we've sealed, we'll return to fix the problem at no additional charge. Our exclusion methods are designed to permanently prevent squirrel entry while maintaining your home's appearance.
